basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: AI-focused Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience delivering scalable, high-impact solutions. Spearheaded architectural innovations leading to $1.5M revenue, enhanced user experiences using React and Typescript, and developed complex systems for 10M+ users. Proven team leader, driving product iterations through effective collaboration and data-driven decision-making.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead enhancing platform reliability and driving innovation through scalable systems and AI-powered features, used by millions of users.
highlights: Led architectural design and launch of Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR through agile methodologies and customer-focused iteration
Spearheaded Beekeeper's Templating Engine — reduced setup time by 90% and enhanced user engagement significantly, now powers 15% of all platform assets
Engineered robust search interface accommodating 10M+ users, elevating user engagement and accelerating platform adoption rate
Assembled and led remote engineering teams, fostering an environment for high-quality code and customer-centric solutions
Collaborated with product managers on A/B experiments to derive insightful data for product iterations
Designed and deployed production-quality Generative AI translation systems — translated 12K+ key-value pairs, saved $337K and accelerated go-to-market
Built AI-driven stream template system for the sales team, boosting demo speed and personalization

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Contributed as a mentor and evaluator, fostering scalability and technical innovation among startups.
highlights: Guided startups in developing core technical strategies aligned with unique goals, enhancing their scalability and innovation practices
Conducted thorough evaluations of emerging technologies for startups, facilitating growth and enabling impactful solutions

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding engineer for an autonomous drone delivery system, executing over 500 last-mile deliveries.
highlights: Engineered the autonomous drone delivery platform — architected complete software/cloud stack powering 500+ successful deliveries
Delivered cloud infrastructure enabling scalable operations for enterprise partnerships
Engineered real-time flight control APIs, optimizing delivery times by 40% and maintaining a 99.5% safety record

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led the development of an open-source platform for robot co-evolution, significantly contributing to advancements in AI and robotics.
highlights: Spearheaded AWS migration for Robogen, securing AWS Research Credits and featured on the AWS Research Blog
Supervised 20+ master's students in robotics and AI research, fostering innovation and hands-on experience
Contributed to groundbreaking research leading to industry recognition in artificial evolution and robotics

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: Microfrontends: Revolutionising Frontend Architecture
publications.summary: Technical deep-dive presentation demonstrating how microfrontend architecture enables scalable, team-autonomous development while reducing deployment complexity for enterprise applications.

publications.name: AI and creativity
publications.summary: Keynote presentation exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and human creativity, demonstrating how AI can augment rather than replace creative processes in product development.

publications.name: From Idea to Product
publications.summary: Comprehensive methodology presentation on accelerating product development cycles through lean validation, rapid prototyping, and data-driven decision making in startup environments.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Built a real-time stock market analysis platform using AI agents, generating and explaining trading signals.
Focused on explainable AI for clarity in financial analysis, enhancing user experience.
Transitioned from a personal tool to a public platform for retail traders and investors.

projects.name: Proplab - AI Real Estate Tools
highlights: Developed an MVP for a fully digitalized property inspection system, replacing manual workflows.
Currently leading an AI-powered marketing assistant project to automate listing creation, improving property visibility.
Implemented structured, image-backed protocols to enhance data integrity.

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Launched the first platform for cross-border financial challenges for Indian nationals in Switzerland, addressing a significant market need.
Developed the MVP in just 3 months, focusing on customer feedback for iterative improvements.
Designed the solution with compliance in mind, navigating multiple complex financial regulations.

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
Why Mintlify?
We're on a mission to empower builders.

Massive reach: Our docs platform serves 100 million+ developers every year and powers documentation for 10,000+ companies, including Anthropic, Cursor, PayPal, Coinbase, X, and over 20% of the last YC batch.

Small team, huge impact: We’re only 28 people today, backed by $22 million in funding, each new hire shapes the company’s trajectory.

Culture of slope over y-intercept: We value learning velocity, grit, and unapologetically unique personalities.

We grew in value faster than headcount and we’re looking to align the two quickly.

What you'll work on here
Collaborating closely with backend, frontend, and design to build customer-facing functionality

Contributing to smooth user experience through well-thought-out UI/UX design, utilizing Next.js, React, and Typescript

Improving application performance by profiling

Architecting and implementing performant, scalable, and reliable solutions in the content and knowledge management space

Implementing complex React components from WYSIWYG to the virtualized rendering of large data collections

What you bring to the table
You have full-stack experience with relevant technologies (Next.js, React, Typescript)

You know how to go from 0-to-1

You have strong communication skills

You thrive in a collaborative team setting

Why you should join our engineering team
Engineers at Mintlify appreciate a high degree of ownership, are passionate about a tasteful user experience, and come to work ready to contribute to a small-but-mighty team.

You’ll have plenty of heads down builder time. We believe in the power of strong teams to drive change - and have created an environment where the best ideas win and we can acknowledge when we’re wrong.

We’re all about finding the intersection between what excites you and business priorities. You’ll jump into new territory and learn something new. You’ll own projects and features. You’ll ship.
